name: OpenIPAHound 11 Support - SSH And Sudo Same Principal
description: Finds users or groups that can both SSH to a FreeIPA host and use sudo on that same host.
query:
MATCH p1=(principal)-[:IPA_CanSSH]->(host:IPA_Computer)
MATCH p2=(principal)-[:IPA_CanSUDO]->(host)
WHERE principal:IPA_User OR principal:IPA_Group
RETURN p1,p2
LIMIT 1000
